# Expense Policy Update Memo

## Approval Limits

Effective this quarter, team leads can approve expenses up to 250 euros on their own signature. Anything above that routes to finance for sign off, same as before.

## Travel

From May onward every travel booking has to go through the corporate portal. Bookings made outside the portal will be reimbursed at the portal rate, not the paid rate.
